description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four wheels. The cannon barrel is made of dark, heavy metal, featuring reinforced rings and a slightly flared muzzle. The wooden carriage is robust, constructed from thick planks, and includes metal fastenings and axles for the wheels. The wheels themselves are solid and appear to be reinforced with metal rims and bolts. The rear of the carriage has a protruding wooden handle or lever, likely used for maneuvering the cannon. The overall appearance suggests a design intended for battlefield use, with a focus on durability and mobility.
description: A heavy metal cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden wheeled carriage, featuring reinforced details and a robust, historical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wooden carriage and wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage structure, and the four solid wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and the handle or lever for maneuvering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the cannon barrel, carriage, and wheels from the other side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage and cannon are exposed with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid dark metal and wood tones.
